guide.title: Math Problems Data Entry Guide
guide.subtitle: Welcome to the data entry team! Please read this quick guide to ensure problems are displayed beautifully and with high scientific accuracy.

latexRules.title: Rules for Writing Equations (LaTeX)

rule1.title: Dedicated Equation Fields (Main Equation + Option Equations)
rule1.desc: In these code-only fields, never write dollar signs $. The platform adds them programmatically.

rule2.title: Equations inside Plain Text (Question + Detailed Solutions)
rule2.desc: When writing plain text and inserting math symbols, you must use dollar signs:
rule2.inline: Use one dollar sign $code$ for inline equations.
rule2.block: Use two dollar signs $$code$$ for large block equations.

latexRules.exampleTitle: Practical Example of a Detailed Solution:
latexRules.exampleCode:
To solve this integral, we use the substitution method. Let:
$$ u = x^2 + 1 $$
Differentiating both sides gives:
$$ du = 2x \, dx $$
Now, we know that the variable $x$ is positive, so we substitute into the equation.

options.title: Options (Answers)
options.point1: Write plain text in the (Arabic/English Text) field as 'First Answer'.
options.point2: If the option contains a fraction or root, use the dedicated (Option Equation) LaTeX field and remember NOT to put $.
options.warning: Important Note: Don't forget to click the 'Mark as Correct' button for the ONLY correct answer. The platform won't let you save without one correct answer.

solutions.title: Detailed Solutions & Video
solutions.desc: The detailed solution is the real value we provide to the student. The explanation must be thorough and step-by-step.
solutions.dashboardDesc: Use the toolbar above text fields. Clicking any symbol (like $\pi$ or $\int$) inserts its LaTeX code directly at your cursor.
solutions.youtubeDesc: If a video explaining the problem is available, copy the full link into the designated field. Example: https://youtube.com/watch?v=...

footer.description: An interactive platform for solving math problems and developing skills

metadata.title: About MathWorld - Our Story & Mission
metadata.description: Discover the story behind MathWorld, our mission to make mathematics accessible, and the team behind the platform.

hero.title: About MathWorld
hero.subtitle: Our journey to make mathematics accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for everyone

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We believe mathematics is the universal language of logic and creativity. Our mission is to break down complex concepts into interactive, solvable challenges that empower learners worldwide.
points: Making math accessible to all levels
Bridging the gap between theory and practice
Building a global community of problem solvers

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the world's leading interactive mathematics platform, where every student, educator, and enthusiast finds the tools and community to excel in mathematical thinking.

items.title: Excellence
items.description: We strive for the highest quality in every problem, solution, and interaction.

items.title: Accessibility
items.description: Mathematics should have no barriers. We design for every learner, everywhere.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We constantly explore new ways to make learning mathematics interactive and fun.

items.title: Community
items.description: We believe in the power of collaborative learning and peer support.

stats.title: Our Impact
stats.subtitle: Numbers that reflect our commitment to mathematical education

features.title: What Makes Us Different
features.subtitle: A platform designed with the learner in mind

items.title: Adaptive Learning
items.description: Problems that adjust to your skill level and learning pace.

items.title: Detailed Solutions
items.description: Step-by-step explanations that teach, not just answer.

items.title: Gamified Experience
items.description: Points, badges, and leaderboards to keep you motivated.

items.title: Bilingual Support
items.description: Full Arabic and English support for a seamless experience.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of learners who have discovered the joy of mathematics

metadata.title: Privacy Policy - MathWorld
metadata.description: Learn how MathWorld collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us. Learn how we protect your data.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: At MathWorld, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.

information.title: Information We Collect
information.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use the information we collect to:
items: Improve our platform and develop new features
Communicate with you about updates and support
Ensure platform security and prevent fraud

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:
items: To protect our rights and safety
With service providers who assist our operations

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

cookies.title: Cookies & Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience, analyze usage patterns, and remember your preferences. You can manage cookie settings through your browser.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:

metadata.title: Contact Us - MathWorld
metadata.description: Get in touch with the MathWorld team. Find our email and social media links.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Have a question or suggestion? We'd love to hear from you.

email.title: Email Us
email.description: For general inquiries, support, or feedback

social.title: Follow Us
social.description: Stay connected through our social media channels

response.title: Response Time
response.description: We typically respond within 24-48 hours during business days.
